actors.name: Donald Trump
actors.blurb: Donald Trump remains the central figure in the right-wing news cycle due to a recent shooting incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, where he was present. The event has sparked widespread media coverage and political reactions globally, focusing on security lapses and Trump's subsequent statements about the incident.

Prezydent Karol Nawrocki z niezapowiedzianą, prywatną wizytą w Kościerzynie. Przyjechał na mszę i galę bokserską. Głowa państwa obejrzy walkę Kacpra Meyny (FOTO)

actors.name: Nigel Farage
actors.blurb: Nigel Farage continues to drive coverage with his political activities, including campaign pledges for local elections and criticisms of the current government. His influence on the UK's political landscape remains significant.
